# Cross-dependency cache (optional)

This folder is **optional**. The previous **git snapshot** workflow (`CrossDependency_GitSnapshot.ps1`, `*_git_snapshot.json`) was **removed** from the cross-dependency pattern (Rule 35a: **no** local merge/git for cross-dep).

Use this directory only if you add **other** machine-generated cache files unrelated to local git merge lookup.

**Workflow pattern:** [`../../docs/CROSS_DEPENDENCY_WORK_PATTERN.md`](../../docs/CROSS_DEPENDENCY_WORK_PATTERN.md).
